★★★★★ 5.0 · 178+ Reviews
CODE COMPLIANCE · EXPERT ENGINEERING · 24/7 EMERGENCY · FULLY INSURED · LICENSED & INSURED · FIRE PROTECTION SPECIALISTS · ESTABLISHED 1977 · NJ & PA SERVICE AREA · CODE COMPLIANCE · EXPERT ENGINEERING · 24/7 EMERGENCY · FULLY INSURED · LICENSED & INSURED · FIRE PROTECTION SPECIALISTS · ESTABLISHED 1977 · NJ & PA SERVICE AREA ·
WHAT WE DO

Our Services

From initial design through emergency response — we cover the full lifecycle of fire sprinkler protection.

01

Design & Engineering

Every system starts with precision planning. We engineer code-compliant fire sprinkler solutions tailored to your facility's specific layout, occupancy, and hazard classification.

  • — Fire sprinkler system engineering
  • — System design & blueprints
  • — Code-compliant planning
02

Installation

Our union-trained fitters bring decades of field experience to every job — from new ground-up construction to retrofitting existing structures.

  • — New system installation
  • — Retrofits & upgrades
  • — Large-scale warehouse & commercial builds
03

Inspection & Testing

Stay compliant and audit-ready with our comprehensive inspection and testing programs, fully aligned with NFPA 25 standards.

  • — Annual & quarterly inspections
  • — NFPA 25 testing
  • — Compliance documentation for fire marshals & insurers
04

Maintenance

Proactive care keeps your system performing at peak reliability. We provide scheduled maintenance programs to prevent failures before they happen.

  • — Ongoing service contracts
  • — Preventative maintenance
  • — System upkeep & component checks
05

Repair

When deficiencies are found during inspection or a system component fails, our technicians respond quickly to restore full protection.

  • — Deficiency corrections
  • — Component repair & replacement
  • — Post-inspection remediation
06

Emergency Service

A leak or system failure can't wait. Our rapid-response teams are on standby 24 hours a day, 365 days a year.

  • — 24/7 emergency response
  • — Rapid leak & failure repair
  • — System restoration
WHO WE SERVE

Sectors We Protect

Commercial

High-rises, retail centers, and professional offices — fully code-compliant systems.

Industrial

Warehouses, manufacturing, and high-piled storage — specialized hazard protection at scale.

Institutional

Hospitals, schools, and government buildings — life safety systems built to the highest standards.

Residential

Multi-family and high-end residential protection — where safety meets interior aesthetics.
OUR TRUSTED VENDORS
VIGILANCE & COMPLIANCE

NFPA 25 Inspection & Testing

Stay compliant and protected with our rigorous inspection protocols. We ensure your system meets all local fire codes and NFPA standards, providing detailed documentation for fire marshals and insurance providers.

  • task_alt
    Annual & Quarterly Inspections Comprehensive checks of valves, pipes, and sprinkler heads per NFPA 25 schedules.
  • task_alt
    Main Drain & Water Flow Tests Verification of adequate water supply and alarm functionality.
  • task_alt
    Deficiency Corrections Rapid repair of any items found during the inspection process.
Schedule an Inspection
45+ Years of Continuous NJ Safety Service
emergency_home

24/7 Emergency Repairs

A leak or system failure can't wait. Our rapid-response teams are on standby 24 hours a day, 365 days a year to keep your facility protected.

IMMEDIATE ASSISTANCE 732-521-1666
Dispatch Technician Now
OUR CREDENTIALS

Licensed, Certified & Fully Insured

We maintain the highest levels of certification and professional insurance to give you peace of mind.

verified_user

Licensed in NJ

Fully state-licensed for fire protection services and system engineering.

security

Fully Insured

General liability and workers' compensation coverage for all industrial worksites.

workspace_premium

NFPA Member

Committed to the highest standards of the National Fire Protection Association.

WHAT OUR CLIENTS SAY

Trusted Across New Jersey & Pennsylvania

★★★★★

"Alert Sprinkler has been servicing our commercial building for over 10 years. Always on time, thorough, and their documentation is perfect for our insurance audits."

Robert M. Google Review
★★★★★

"When we had an emergency leak at 2am, their team was on-site within the hour. Truly 24/7 service — couldn't be more grateful."

"Professional, knowledgeable, and honest. They found deficiencies two other companies missed and fixed everything at a fair price."
